option.name: upgradePath
option.value:
This base tier comes with Android Studio, allowing you to explore how Gemini can enhance your development workflows.
It is available to Google accounts without a Google One plan, and those with unqualified Google One plans.
[Upgrade to a qualified Google AI plan](https://one.google.com/ai?g1_landing_page=75)↗ to get higher limits and access to larger models.
